404.description: Media item or current OCR sidecar not found

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Comma-separated playback session statuses to include

503.description: ffprobe unavailable or rejected the source file

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Legacy media item kind query parameter.

parameters.name: watched
parameters.description: Watched-state filter for the current user.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Stable sort order: recently_added, title, or year.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across title and cast names.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of matching items to skip.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Artwork kind: poster, backdrop, or logo

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of requests to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of matching requests to skip.

409.description: Request cannot be cancelled from its current state

400.description: Invalid request id or fulfillment plan

409.description: Request cannot record a plan from its current state

400.description: Invalid request id or canonical identity

409.description: Request cannot be re-resolved from its current state
Request cannot be reset from its current state

400.description: Invalid request id or request state

get.summary: Serve an HLS master playlist for a media item.

404.description: Media item source file not found

422.description: Packaged transcode output is not playlist-ready

get.summary: Serve a subtitle sidecar as a WebVTT rendition.
Serve a VOD HLS media playlist backed by source-file byte ranges.

422.description: Media item variant is not playlist-ready

503.description: Media item variant is missing persisted probe data

get.summary: Serve a live transcode init segment.

404.description: Live profile or source file not found

get.summary: Serve a live transcode HLS media playlist.

404.description: Live profile or source file not found

get.summary: Serve a live transcode media segment.

404.description: Live profile, source file, or segment not found

get.summary: Serve a source file with single-range support.
get.description:
Multi-range requests such as `Range: bytes=0-99,200-299` are rejected with
`416 Range Not Satisfiable` until segment callers need multipart responses.

get.summary: Serve a transcode output with single-range support.
Serve a packaged transcode output init segment with single-range support.

422.description: Transcode output is missing init segment metadata

get.summary: Serve a packaged transcode output HLS media playlist.
Serve a packaged transcode output media segment with single-range support.

404.description: Transcode output or segment not found

oneOf.description: Session end timestamp, present only once status is ended.

position_seconds.description: Latest recorded playback position in seconds, when known.

token_id.description: Device token associated with the session.

CanonicalLayoutFile.description: A media file that follows Kino's canonical library layout.

kind.description: Media path family matched by the scanner.

path.description: Filesystem path to the canonical media file.

CanonicalLayoutFileKind.description: Media path family matched by the scanner.

CatalogArtwork.description: Catalog artwork URLs for one media item.

oneOf.description: Backdrop artwork, when cached.
Logo artwork, when cached.
Poster artwork, when cached.

source_url.description: Provider URL used as the original image source.

CatalogListPage.description: One page of catalog media items.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to request the next page, when more matches exist.

next_offset.description: Offset to request the next page, when more matches exist.

CatalogMediaItem.description: Catalog projection for one media item.

artwork.description: Cached artwork URLs for this item.

oneOf.description: Canonical identity for provider-backed media.

cast.description: Ordered cast members, when metadata has been enriched.

description.description: Cached overview or description, when metadata has been enriched.

episode_number.description: TV episode number for episode rows.

release_date.description: Cached release or first-air date, when metadata has been enriched.

season_number.description: TV season number for episode rows.

source_files.description: Source files attached to this media item.

subtitle_tracks.description: Subtitle tracks attached to this media item.

title.description: Cached display title, when metadata has been enriched.

variants.description: Streamable source and transcode variants for this item.

year.description: Release or first-air year derived from metadata, when known.

CatalogStreamVariant.description: Streamable variant exposed on catalog item responses.

capabilities.description: Best available capability hints for client selection.

stream_url.description: Relative API URL used to stream this variant.

variant_id.description: Stable variant id within the catalog.

CatalogSubtitleTrack.description: Catalog projection for one subtitle track.

forced.description: Whether the subtitle track is marked forced.

label.description: Display label for client subtitle menus.

provenance.description: How the subtitle text was derived.

track_index.description: Probed subtitle stream index in the source file.

target.description: Raw title or query text requested by the user.

label.description: Operator-facing label for the device token.
Operator-facing label for the device token.

token.description: Plaintext bearer token. This value is returned only once.

FulfillmentPlan.description: Versioned fulfillment plan recorded for a request.

oneOf.description: Optional actor responsible for the plan.
Status event associated with planning, when applicable.

FulfillmentPlanDecision.description: Top-level decision produced by fulfillment planning.

LibraryScanMissingFile.description: Source-file row whose filesystem path no longer exists.

source_file.description: Source-file row that points at the missing path.

LibraryScanOrphan.description: Canonical media file on disk with no matching source-file row.

kind.description: Media path family matched by the scanner.

path.description: Filesystem path found by the canonical layout scan.

LibraryScanReport.description: Complete output from a library scan and DB reconciliation run.

canonical_files.description: Canonical media files found on disk.

layout_violations.description: Filesystem entries that do not follow Kino's canonical layout.

missing.description: Source-file rows whose filesystem path no longer exists.

orphans.description: Canonical media files with no matching `source_files.path` row.

LibrarySourceFile.description: Persisted source-file row used for library reconciliation.

audio_tracks.description: Audio tracks discovered in the source file.

media_item_id.description: Media item that owns this source file.

path.description: Canonical source path stored in the catalog.

oneOf.description: Probe metadata captured from the source file, when available.

subtitle_tracks.description: Subtitle tracks discovered in the source file.

transcode_outputs.description: Transcode outputs derived from this source file.

tokens.description: Device tokens owned by the seeded user.

path.description: Existing source path to ingest for the request.

MediaItemKind.description: User-facing media item kind stored in the catalog.

MetadataCastMember.description: Ordered cast member returned by the TMDB metadata provider.

profile_path.description: Optional local or provider profile path.

position_seconds.description: Latest recorded playback position in seconds.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the latest recorded progress update.

watched.description: Whether the media item is marked watched for the current user.

PlaybackSessionStatus.description: Lifecycle state for an observed playback session.

canonical_identity_id.description: Canonical identity selected by the resolver or operator.

job_id.description: Tracking id for this synchronous re-OCR execution.

probe_duration_seconds.description: Persisted duration in whole seconds, when ffprobe reported one.

oneOf.description: Failure reason when `state` is `Failed`.
Fulfillment plan id once planning persistence exists.

target.description: Media target requested by the principal.

RequestDetail.description: Internal detail projection for request reads.

candidates.description: Ranked candidates when the request needs disambiguation.

oneOf.description: Current fulfillment plan, if planning has run.

identity_versions.description: Canonical identity history ordered by version.

plan_history.description: Fulfillment plan history ordered by version.

oneOf.description: Kino changed state automatically.
A user initiated the state change.

user.description: A user initiated the state change.

RequestEventActor.description: Actor associated with a request status event.

RequestFailureReason.description: Typed reason for a failed request.

RequestIdentityProvenance.description: Provenance for a request canonical identity version.

RequestIdentityVersion.description: Versioned canonical identity selected for a request.

oneOf.description: Optional actor responsible for the identity choice.
Status event written by the same resolution transition.

RequestListPage.description: One page of request list results.

next_offset.description: Offset for the next page when another page may exist.

RequestMatchCandidate.description: Ranked candidate stored when a request needs disambiguation.

popularity.description: Provider popularity value used only as a tiebreaker.

score.description: Confidence score in the inclusive range `0.0..=1.0`.

year.description: Candidate release or first-air year when known.

oneOf.description: Request submitted without an authenticated user.
Request created by Kino itself.
Request submitted by an authenticated user.

user.description: Request submitted by an authenticated user.

RequestStatusEvent.description: Durable status event for a request state change.

oneOf.description: Optional actor responsible for the transition.
Previous request state, absent for the creation event.

RequestTarget.description: Target media identity captured by a request.

oneOf.description: Resolved canonical identity id.

raw_query.description: Raw query text supplied by the requester.

candidates.description: Ranked resolver candidates returned by TMDB-backed scoring.

SourceFileAudioTrack.description: Audio track facts for a probed source file.

language.description: Language tag reported for the stream.

track_index.description: Probed stream index in the source file.

SourceFileProbe.description: Source-file probe facts used by item-detail clients.

oneOf.description: Video stream facts, when the source has a probed video stream.

SourceFileSubtitleTrack.description: Subtitle track facts for a probed source file.

forced.description: Whether the subtitle stream is marked forced.

format.description: Subtitle sidecar format exposed to clients.

provenance.description: Whether the track is text or OCR-derived.

track_index.description: Probed stream index in the source file.

SourceFileVideoProbe.description: Video stream facts for a probed source file.

resolution.description: Resolution label such as `1080p`, when known.

StorageLayoutViolation.description: A filesystem entry that does not follow Kino's storage policy.

path.description: Filesystem path that violated the policy.

StorageLayoutViolationKind.description: Stable reason a filesystem entry violated the storage policy.

SubtitleProvenance.description: How a subtitle sidecar's text was derived.

label.description: Operator-facing label for the device token.

oneOf.description: Last successful authentication time.
Revocation time, if the token has been revoked.

TranscodeOutput.description: Derived stream output produced from a source file.

source_file_id.description: Source file this output was derived from.

VariantCapabilities.description: Capability hints clients can use when choosing a stream variant.

codec.description: Video codec label, or `unknown` when not yet probed.

container.description: Container format label, or `unknown` when not yet known.

resolution.description: Resolution label such as `1080p`, when known.
